columns.column_name: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: Extract from Table 3 on page 8. The column 'SOC + AAP' and row 'High-risk' provides the number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm with high-risk metastatic disease. Specifically, n=241.

columns.column_name: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Control
columns.extraction_plan: Extract from Table 3 on page 8. The column 'SOC-alone' and row 'High-risk' provides the number and percentage of participants in the control arm with high-risk metastatic disease. Specifically, n=232.

columns.column_name: Volume of disease - N (%) | Low | Control
columns.extraction_plan: Extract from Table 3 on page 8. The column 'SOC-alone' and row 'Low-risk' provides the number and percentage of participants in the control arm with low-risk metastatic disease. Specifically, n=220.
